title: Israel Said to Have Helped Defend Emirates in Iran War With Iron Dome
summary_full: It appeared to be the first time the missile defense system was sent to an Arab country. The Emirates bore the brunt of Iran’s retaliatory attacks on Gulf countries during the war.
summary_public: It appeared to be the first time the missile defense system was sent to an Arab country. The Emirates bore the brunt of Iran’s retaliatory attacks on Gulf countries during the war.

IL.label: positive
IL.evidence: Israel Said to Have Helped Defend Emirates

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran’s retaliatory attacks on Gulf countries
